programmes.show_description: The path to love is never straight... Dannii Minogue is back to play Cupid in this smash-hit gay dating show - and this time, we're helping girls who like girls! (HD)
Jonathan Ross, the heavyweight of comedy chat, gets up close and personal with A-list stars in this no-holds-barred talk show. (HD)
